summary: MVP smoke test for Nat2Go Studio OS. Backend (10 pytest tests) and frontend (login, dashboard render with empty state, nav between Dashboard/Clientes/Contenido/Admin/No Olvidar tabs, theme toggle) all pass. Zero React runtime errors. Google Calendar correctly returns mocked empty list when not connected.

minor.issue: Default JWT_SECRET 'supersecret' (30 bytes) emits InsecureKeyLengthWarning. Set a strong secret (>=32 bytes) via env.
No brute-force lockout / rate limit (playbook requires lockout after 5 fails).
secure=False on cookies; behind HTTPS preview proxy this still works via samesite=lax, but should be secure=True in production.
REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is the same domain as frontend (preview proxy). Origins list works but redundant; consider explicit FRONTEND_URL env.
Accepts arbitrary dict updates without Pydantic validation (could overwrite user_id). Should restrict allowed fields.

ui_bugs.issue: Button has no onClick handler, clicking does nothing (no modal/form wired up).
Round button to toggle task completion has no visual checked state (empty even when completed).
Sidebar uses 'hidden md:flex' so on mobile (<768px) sidebar disappears with no hamburger menu; user cannot navigate.

issues: Background image loads from external URL; if blocked, falls back to light bg only - acceptable.
Empty-state placeholder for 'Próximas Entregas' is static text not data-driven.

action_items: Wire up quick-add-btn to open a task creation modal/form.
Add mobile responsive nav (hamburger) since sidebar is hidden below md breakpoint.
Restrict PUT update payloads via Pydantic (TaskUpdate, ClientUpdate, etc.) to prevent overwriting user_id/_id.
Set strong JWT_SECRET (>=32 bytes) via env and secure=True cookies for production.
Add visual completed state for the priority task checkbox circle.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is ~376 lines with repetitive CRUD for tasks/clients/content/admin_tasks. Consider generic resource factory to DRY up.
PUT endpoints take raw dict and pass directly to $set - security risk (could set user_id, password_hash on /api/auth flows if extended). Use Pydantic update models.
Admin password defaults to 'admin' and is reset on every startup - intentional for dev but flag for production.
ObjectId is properly excluded via format_doc helper - good.
seed_data_creation: None. Admin user seeded by backend startup hook.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP smoke is green. All 4 tabs render, theme toggle works, login + JWT cookie auth works. Backend has 10 passing pytest tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Next iterations should test CRUD modals/forms once main agent wires up quick-add and per-tab create flows. Google Calendar integration is mocked (returns []) when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET absent - this is expected per problem statement.
